title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Honda Motorcycle India in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!
